system.name: Agent Relay
system.description: Real-time agent-to-agent communication system for spawning and coordinating AI agents

people.name: Developer
people.description: Builds multi-agent applications using the TypeScript or Python SDK

external_systems.name: Relaycast Cloud
external_systems.description: WebSocket relay backbone that brokers messages between agents

external_systems.name: Claude CLI
external_systems.description: Anthropic Claude coding agent spawned as a PTY subprocess

external_systems.name: Codex CLI
external_systems.description: OpenAI Codex coding agent spawned as a PTY subprocess

external_systems.name: PostHog
external_systems.description: Product analytics and telemetry event collection

external_systems.name: SQLite
external_systems.description: Local persistence for relay state and session data

external_systems.name: Fly.io
external_systems.description: Cloud platform hosting the Agent Relay API and web dashboard

relationships.description: Imports SDK and spawns agents via TypeScript or Python API
Connects via WebSocket to relay messages between agents
Spawns Claude as a PTY subprocess and injects relay MCP config
Spawns Codex as a PTY subprocess and injects relay MCP config
Sends telemetry events for usage tracking
Cloud API and dashboard deployed to Fly.io
